messages.content: Hi! How can I help you today?

Hi! I need some help with my recent orders and my account info. I just moved to a new house on Elm Avenue here in Houston, and I noticed that one of my orders was sent to my old address by mistake. I’d like to update the shipping address for that order to my new place, and also change my default address on my account to the new one. Can you help me with that?

I’d like to update the shipping address for that order to my new place, and also change my default address on my account to the new one. Can you help me with that?
